title: diplotaxis brassicoides var. longifolia
intro: Diplotaxis brassicoides var. longifolia, also known as wild rocket or long-leaved wall rocket, is a perennial plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a wild relative of the cultivated rocket plant and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and digestive issues. Diplotaxis brassicoides var. longifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
